creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Alexander Motin from comment #3)

So those panic were reproduced on those head version:
- main-stabweek-2024-Oct: main-n273082-525a177c1657 (2024-10-20) 
- main-stabweek-2024-Nov: main-n273822-ff4c19bb5427 (2024-11-25)

Thanks for your patch: I’m starting to test your patch on main branch from today.
